game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **앵그리버드 2 (Angry Birds 2)**: Angry Birds 2 is a physics-based puzzle game where players use a slingshot to launch various birds at structures housing green pigs, aiming to destroy them and retrieve stolen eggs. Players control the slingshot by dragging back to adjust trajectory and power, then releasing to fling a chosen bird, with some birds allowing a tap mid-flight to activate a special ability. Levels are multi-stage, requiring strategic bird selection from a limited roster to dismantle complex pig fortifications and defeat boss pigs. Progression involves completing hundreds of levels, earning feathers to level up individual birds and increase their scoring power, and collecting cosmetic hats. Players can also compete in the Arena against others for leaderboard rankings or join Clans to collaborate on challenges.
game_info.description: Launch birds from a slingshot to destroy pig fortresses and defeat all the pigs! Use physics to your advantage - aim carefully and use each bird's special ability at the right moment. Complete levels by eliminating all pigs with your limited birds. Earn stars based on your score and progress through increasingly challenging structures.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (Left/Right): Adjust slingshot aim angle
Arrow Keys (Up/Down): Adjust slingshot power
Space: Launch the bird
Z: Activate bird's special ability (mid-flight only)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic slingshot mechanics and bird launching. This verifies that the aiming system works correctly, power adjustment functions properly, and birds launch with the expected trajectory. Tests the core physics-based gameplay loop.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Automatically cycle through different aim angles and power levels, launching birds at regular intervals. Test both minimum and maximum power levels. Verify that birds follow proper parabolic trajectories and interact correctly with the ground and structures.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Birds should launch at various angles with different speeds based on power settings. Trajectories should be smooth and physically accurate. No birds should get stuck or behave erratically. The test is successful when 5+ birds are launched with varying parameters without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing winning condition by automatically destroying all pigs. This validates that collision detection works, pigs take damage correctly, structures collapse realistically, and the game properly detects and transitions to the win state.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Launch birds with calculated aim and power to directly hit pig positions. Use special abilities when birds are near pigs. Continue launching until all pigs are destroyed or birds run out. Aim for maximum destruction efficiency.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All pigs should be destroyed through collisions with birds or falling debris. Game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state when the last pig is eliminated. Score should increase with each pig destroyed and structure piece broken. Test succeeds when win condition is reached within available birds.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing bird special abilities activation and effects. Verifies that pressing Z during flight triggers the appropriate special ability for each bird type and that abilities have visible, functional effects on gameplay.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Launch birds and activate special abilities at different points in their trajectory. Test abilities near structures, pigs, and in open air. Verify red bird speed boost, blue bird split, and yellow bird dive work correctly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Each bird type should demonstrate its unique ability when Z is pressed during flight. Red birds accelerate forward, blue birds split into three, yellow birds dive downward with increased speed. Abilities should only activate once per bird and only during flight. Test succeeds when all three bird types successfully demonstrate their abilities.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing lose condition and bird depletion. Validates that the game correctly tracks remaining birds, prevents launching when no birds are available, and transitions to game over state when birds run out with pigs remaining.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Launch all available birds intentionally missing the targets or with minimal impact. Ensure each launch depletes the bird count. Attempt to launch after running out of birds. Verify the game detects failure condition when pigs remain.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Bird counter should decrease with each launch. Game should prevent launching when bird count reaches zero. If pigs remain after all birds are used, game should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Appropriate game over message should display. Test succeeds when lose condition triggers correctly.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing structure stability and physics interactions. Verifies that wooden blocks stack properly, respond to collisions realistically, and collapse when support is removed. Tests the structural integrity system.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Launch birds to hit strategic points in structures - remove bottom blocks, side supports, and corner pieces. Observe how structures react to partial damage. Test chain reactions and cascading collapses.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Structures should remain stable until critical support blocks are destroyed. Blocks should fall realistically under gravity when unsupported. Collisions should transfer momentum appropriately. Chain reactions should cause additional blocks to fall. Test succeeds when structures demonstrate realistic physics behavior including at least one major collapse.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing scoring system and star awards. Validates that points are awarded correctly for pig destruction and block destruction, and that star ratings are calculated accurately based on final score.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Complete a level while tracking score increases. Destroy pigs and blocks systematically. Finish the level and check the final score and star rating. Verify score thresholds for 1, 2, and 3 stars work correctly.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Score should increase by 1000 points per pig destroyed and 100 points per block destroyed. Unused birds should award bonus points. Star rating should reflect performance: 1 star for basic completion, 2 stars for good score, 3 stars for high score. Test succeeds when score calculations are accurate and star awards are appropriate.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing pause functionality and game state management. Verifies that ESC key properly pauses and unpauses the game, physics simulation stops during pause, and UI correctly displays pause state.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Pressing ESC during gameplay should freeze all physics and display pause overlay. Game should remain frozen until ESC is pressed again. Upon unpause, all objects should resume from their paused positions with correct velocities. Test succeeds when pause/unpause works flawlessly through multiple cycles without causing physics glitches.

Upon unpause, all objects should resume from their paused positions with correct velocities. Test succeeds when pause/unpause works flawlessly through multiple cycles without causing physics glitches.
